name: cute-claude-hooks
description: 🌸 让 Claude Code 拥有完整的中文体验！粉色中文提示 + 界面汉化，专为编程小白设计

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
🌸 感谢安装 cute-claude-hooks! 🌸

请运行以下命令完成安装:

  Windows: cute-claude-hooks-install
  macOS/Linux: cute-claude-hooks-install

或查看文档: https://github.com/gugug168/cute-claude-hooks
')"
scripts.uninstall:
node -e "console.log('
🌸 卸载 cute-claude-hooks... 🌸
请手动删除 ~/.claude/hooks/tool-tips-post.sh 和 ~/.claude/localize/ 目录
')"

author: gugug168
